knowledge.title: Overpass A site: heaven + connector crossfire
knowledge.description: CT A: one player heaven (above site), one player connector (close angle from CT spawn). Heaven covers long A, connector traps the entry. Both on site = double frag from a long smoke.
knowledge.situation: CT A defense, full buy
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: heaven-connector crossfire is standard Overpass A

knowledge.title: Overpass B site: pillar + bench anchor
knowledge.description: CT B: one player pillar (close angle on tunnels exit), one player bench (off-angle from monster). Pillar traps the tunnel push, bench trades. Avoid both on site — monster molly frags both.
knowledge.situation: CT B defense
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: pillar-bench crossfire is standard Overpass B

knowledge.title: Overpass monster: monster control with utility
knowledge.description: CT monster player holds monster with molly + flash. Molly delays the T monster push by ~3 seconds; flash supports a peek. Losing monster control loses ~25% of B round win expectation.
knowledge.situation: CT monster defense
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: monster control predicts B round outcome on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass A execute: smoke heaven + smoke long + molly site
knowledge.description: A execute: smoke heaven (cuts the high angle), smoke long (cuts long A), molly site (clears the close hold), flash from short for entry. ~70% plant rate with full A execute on Overpass.
knowledge.situation: T-side A execute
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: full-utility A execute is standard Overpass T A strat

knowledge.title: Overpass B execute: smoke heaven + molly bench + flash entry
knowledge.description: B execute from monster: smoke heaven (cuts the rotate), molly bench (clears the off-angle), flash from monster for entry. Plant for tunnels angle. ~68% plant rate with full B execute.
knowledge.situation: T-side B execute via monster
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: full-utility B execute is most reliable Overpass B strat

knowledge.title: Overpass long molly: deny long A control
knowledge.description: Throw a molly to long A within the first 10 seconds. Molly delays any long push by ~3 seconds and burns CT utility. Cheap, consistent setup utility.
knowledge.situation: T anti-long control
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: long molly is in ~75% of T A hits on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass pistol: T B monster fast push
knowledge.description: T pistol on Overpass: stack 4 monster + 1 connector for fast B hit. Plant for tunnels angle. CTs cannot rotate from A in time. ~58% T pistol WR with monster stack.
knowledge.situation: T pistol round on Overpass
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: monster stack is the highest-WR Overpass T pistol

knowledge.title: Overpass force buy: B monster with armor + Galils
knowledge.description: Overpass B forces work because monster execute is utility-driven and short. A forces have low success — long A punishes under-buys.
knowledge.situation: T force buy decision
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: Overpass B force wins ~40%, A force ~22%

knowledge.title: Overpass save: route through T spawn or playground
knowledge.description: Overpass saves route back through T spawn or playground (the side route). Avoid long A saves — long is the most punished save route. Tier-1 retention rate ~70%.
knowledge.situation: Overpass save round
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: tier-1 Overpass save retention ~70%

knowledge.title: Overpass long duel: pre-aim head level on bombsite corner
knowledge.description: Long A duels are decided by pre-aim. The bombsite corner is head-level for both sides. Pre-aim the corner as you peek long.
knowledge.situation: Long A duel
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: top players hold long with head-level pre-aim >95%

knowledge.title: Overpass monster duel: spray transfer through smoke
knowledge.description: Monster duels happen at close range and often through smoke. Spray transfer (kill one, walk crosshair) wins more than tap. Monster fights reward muscle-memory spray.
knowledge.situation: Monster close-range duel
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: spray-transfer accounts for ~40% of monster frags

knowledge.title: Overpass connector duel: jiggle peek for the AWP
knowledge.description: Connector AWP duels are decided by who shoulder peeks first. Bait the AWP shot, then push within 0.4 seconds while the AWPer is in scope-out animation.
knowledge.situation: Connector AWP duel
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: shoulder peek + commit wins ~55% of connector AWP duels

knowledge.title: Overpass long contact: rotate to B on a trade
knowledge.description: If you take a long A trade, rotate to B through monster within 6 seconds. The long contact pulls CT A players; B opens up. Slow play after long contact wastes the rotation window.
knowledge.situation: Long contact, deciding next call
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: post-long-contact B execute wins ~58% on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass IGL: monster info gates the call
knowledge.description: Send a monster player on every default round. Monster sound cues confirm CT B count and trigger A vs B commit. Highest-value information point on Overpass.
knowledge.situation: T default information gathering
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: tier-1 Overpass IGLs base ~60% of commits on monster info

knowledge.title: Overpass A fake: 25-second commit
knowledge.description: A fakes on Overpass commit utility for 25 seconds (long smoke + heaven flash + gunfire) then re-rotate to B through monster. 25 seconds is the sweet spot — shorter fakes don't pull rotates.
knowledge.situation: A fake into B execute
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: 25-second A fake to B execute wins ~58% on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass A retake: from connector with smoke + flash
knowledge.description: A retake from connector with smoke (cuts the lurker), flash, 3-stack push. Avoid heaven retakes — heaven is exposed to long lurk. Connector retakes win ~50%.
knowledge.situation: CT retake A site
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: connector retakes win ~50% on Overpass A

knowledge.title: Overpass B post-plant: hold from monster lurk
knowledge.description: Post-plant B: lurk back through monster to hold the retake from heaven AND see the rotate from A. Avoid sitting on site — bench molly hits site first.
knowledge.situation: T post-plant B
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: monster lurk outperforms site-hold by ~12 points on Overpass B

knowledge.title: Overpass A plant: behind party box, exposed to heaven
knowledge.description: Default A plant is behind party box, exposed to heaven. The lurker can pre-fire heaven defuse from long. Avoid plants in the open — CT defuses from cover.
knowledge.situation: T A plant location
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: behind-party plant has highest post-plant WR on Overpass A

knowledge.title: Overpass anti-strat: counter B short aggression with connector smoke
knowledge.description: If the T keeps pushing B short aggressively, smoke the B short exit and play a passive hold from site. The smoke forces the T to push blind or wait for it to fade — both options waste their timing. Follow with a flash to retake short control.
knowledge.situation: CT defending against B short aggression on Overpass
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: B short exit smoke reduces T success to ~25% on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass anti-strat: counter A long push with party molly
knowledge.description: If the T keeps pushing A long, molly the party area (the open area before the site). This forces the T to wait or take damage. Follow with a flash from heaven to counter-peek. The molly + flash combo denies A long control for 10+ seconds.
knowledge.situation: CT defending against A long pushes on Overpass
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: party molly + heaven flash denies A long ~70% of the time on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass entry: B short entry with flash for monster
knowledge.description: Entry through B short on Overpass requires a flash for monster — the most dangerous angle. Pop flash over the wall to blind the monster hold, then wide swing into site. Without the flash, the monster player kills the entry ~55% of the time.
knowledge.situation: Entry fragger on Overpass B short push
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: flash-assisted B short entry wins ~52% vs ~28% dry against monster hold

knowledge.title: Overpass AWP: A long AWP from heaven
knowledge.description: The CT AWP on Overpass holds A long from heaven — the height advantage makes it the strongest AWP position. You can see the entire A long approach and reposition to bathroom in 3 seconds. Heaven AWP is the default on Overpass.
knowledge.situation: AWP player on CT Overpass, A defense
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: heaven AWP on Overpass averages 0.9 opening kills per half

knowledge.title: Overpass lurk: connector lurk during B execute
knowledge.description: When the team executes B, the lurker holds connector. CTs rotating from A through connector walk into the lurk. Overpass connector rotations are predictable — time the ambush for 6-8 seconds after the B execute smokes land.
knowledge.situation: Lurker on T-side Overpass during B execute
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: connector lurk catches A-to-B rotators ~40% of the time on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass support: B site smoke wall for execute
knowledge.description: Support on Overpass T-side throws the B smoke wall: smoke heaven, smoke pillar, and flash for the entry. The smoke wall cuts CT sightlines and allows the team to enter site safely. Without smokes, B entries face 3+ angles simultaneously.
knowledge.situation: Support player utility for Overpass B execute
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: full smoke wall B execute has ~68% plant rate on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass clutch: 1v1 B site — use water for escape
knowledge.description: In a 1v1 on Overpass B as T, plant for short and hold from monster. If the CT pushes through connector, water provides an escape route. Water awareness is unique to Overpass — use the underground route to reposition during clutch scenarios.
knowledge.situation: 1v1 clutch on Overpass B as T
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: water escape routes contribute to ~15% of successful T clutches on Overpass B

knowledge.title: Overpass: playground control for A split
knowledge.description: Taking playground control gives the T a flanking path to A site. Push playground early with a flash, then hold passively until the A execute starts. The split from long + playground collapses A defense from two sides.
knowledge.situation: T-side Overpass, planning an A split
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: long + playground A split has ~65% plant rate on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass: A retake from bathroom with utility
knowledge.description: CT retaking A on Overpass should push from bathroom with smoke (cuts long lurk) + flash. Bathroom is the safest retake path because it bypasses the T's post-plant angles. Without the long smoke, the T lurker gets free kills on retaking CTs.
knowledge.situation: CT retake A site on Overpass
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: bathroom retake with long smoke succeeds ~48% on Overpass A

knowledge.title: Overpass IGL: monster read for B defense adjustment
knowledge.description: At the 0:20 mark, listen for monster footsteps and utility. Heavy monster activity at 0:20 signals a fast B take — rotate a third player from A immediately. If monster is silent until 0:40, the T is likely pushing A long or defaulting. Base your B stack on monster timing, not connector info.
knowledge.situation: CT-side Overpass, IGL reading monster timing
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: monster audio reads correctly predict B executes in ~60% of T defaults on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass support: A retake flash from bathroom
knowledge.description: Save one flash for A retakes. Throw a bathroom pop flash that bounces off the wall and blinds anyone on site facing long or party. Push from bathroom immediately after the flash. This single flash raises A retake success by ~10 points and bypasses the long lurk angle.
knowledge.situation: Support player holding utility for A retake on Overpass
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: bathroom flash A retake succeeds ~52% vs ~38% dry on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass clutch: 1v2 A site — use party box for isolation
knowledge.description: In a 1v2 on Overpass A as T post-plant, hold from behind party box. The party angle gives sight on the bomb from cover and forces CTs to split their approach around the box. Pick one off as they approach the bomb, then reposition behind the box to face the second.
knowledge.situation: 1v2 clutch on Overpass A site as T
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: party box post-plant on Overpass A wins ~23% of 1v2 T clutches

knowledge.title: Overpass AWP: B long angle from pillar
knowledge.description: Hold B long from the pillar with the AWP. The pillar provides cover and the long sightline catches T entries pushing from monster before they reach site. After the first kill, drop behind pillar to avoid the flash — reposition to bench only if the T team pauses.
knowledge.situation: CT AWP holding B long from pillar on Overpass
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: pillar AWP on Overpass B averages 0.7 opening kills per half

knowledge.title: Overpass anti-strat: counter B monster push with double molly
knowledge.description: If the T keeps pushing B through monster, throw two molotovs — one at the monster exit and one at the monster corridor 3 seconds later. The double molly creates a 14-second fire wall that completely denies the monster push. Follow with a flash if they try to push through the gap.
knowledge.situation: CT losing B to repeated monster pushes on Overpass
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: double molly monster denial reduces push success from ~50% to ~15% on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass entry: A long push with heaven flash
knowledge.description: Entry through A long requires a flash that pops at the heaven angle. Bounce the flash off the right wall so it blinds the heaven hold. Push long immediately after — the heaven player is blind for 1.5 seconds. Without the flash, the heaven AWP kills long entries ~55% of the time.
knowledge.situation: Entry fragger pushing A long on Overpass
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: heaven flash long entry succeeds ~50% vs ~28% dry on Overpass A

knowledge.title: Overpass lurk: bathroom lurk during B execute
knowledge.description: When the team executes B through monster, lurk in bathroom. CTs rotating from A through connector pass the bathroom sightline. Time the ambush for 6-8 seconds after the B execute smokes land. Bathroom lurk on Overpass catches rotators from an angle they rarely check.
knowledge.situation: Lurker on T-side Overpass during B execute, bathroom position
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: bathroom lurk catches A-to-B rotators ~38% of the time on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass economy: force buy B short with armor and Galils
knowledge.description: On force buy rounds, hit B short with armor + Galils + flashes. B short on Overpass is the shortest execute path and the angles favor Galil spray range. Avoid A long force buys — the heaven AWP dominates under-buys on long sightlines.
knowledge.situation: T force buy decision on Overpass
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: B short force with Galils wins ~38% on Overpass — highest force WR for the map

knowledge.title: Overpass positioning: A party defense with off-angle
knowledge.description: Hold A from the party area behind the back box, not the obvious party front. The deep angle catches T entries as they clear the standard party position and look toward long. Fall back to bathroom after one kill — staying party after contact exposes you to the connector trade.
knowledge.situation: CT A defense from party area on Overpass
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: deep party off-angle wins first contact ~56% on Overpass A

knowledge.title: Overpass B retake: CT spawn push with monster smoke
knowledge.description: Retake B from CT spawn with a smoke on monster to isolate the T lurker. Push from CT toward site with a flash from connector. The CT spawn approach avoids the monster post-plant angles. Without the monster smoke, T lurkers in monster get free kills on ~40% of B retakes.
knowledge.situation: CT retaking B from CT spawn on Overpass
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: CT retake with monster smoke succeeds ~46% on Overpass B

knowledge.title: Overpass utility: monster smoke for safe B approach
knowledge.description: Throw a monster smoke from T side that blocks the CT pillar sightline into monster corridor. This single smoke enables safe passage through monster to B site. Without it, the pillar player picks T entries in ~35% of monster pushes. The monster smoke is the most critical T utility on Overpass B takes.
knowledge.situation: T-side Overpass, safe monster passage
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: monster smoke reduces T entry deaths from ~35% to ~8% on Overpass B approaches

knowledge.title: Overpass mid-round: playground control after A trade
knowledge.description: After winning an A long trade, take playground control within 5 seconds. Playground gives a flanking path to A site that bypasses the standard CT retake angles. Push playground with one player while the team holds long — the two-angle pressure collapses the A defense.
knowledge.situation: T-side Overpass, playground control after A long trade
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: playground push after A trade raises execute success by ~14 points on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass IGL: second-half CT adjustment read
knowledge.description: When switching to CT side on Overpass, review T attack patterns from the first half. If the enemy consistently pushed B through monster, double-stack B with a connector crossfire and play retake A. If they exploited A long with fast executes, set an aggressive bathroom AWP to slow the push. Adjust within the first two CT rounds to establish the defensive anchor.
knowledge.situation: CT-side Overpass, second-half opening rounds as IGL
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: IGLs who adjust CT setups within 2 rounds of half-switch win ~8% more rounds on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass IGL: timeout trigger on monster control collapse
knowledge.description: Call a timeout on Overpass after losing two consecutive rounds where the Ts took monster control. Monster is the critical B approach on Overpass — losing it means the T timing is outpacing your B setup. Use the timeout to assign a dedicated monster AWP from the connector angle, pre-molotov the monster exit, and adjust the B anchor to play retake from heaven instead of holding site.
knowledge.situation: CT-side Overpass, losing monster control repeatedly
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: timeouts after losing monster control recover the setup in ~53% of cases on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass lurk: connector to A bathroom flank route
knowledge.description: As the T lurker on Overpass, push through connector and rotate toward A bathroom while your team executes B through monster. Wait until you hear the B execute utility, then push through connector into bathroom. The A anchor will rotate toward B on the execute call — you catch them mid-rotation at the party area or take A long uncontested.
knowledge.situation: T-side Overpass, lurk during B monster execute
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: connector-to-bathroom lurk flanks produce a kill in ~31% of B execute rounds on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass lurk: CT monster flank during A retake
knowledge.description: As the CT lurker on Overpass, hold monster during an A site retake. When your team pushes A through long and bathrooms, push monster toward B short to cut off the T rotation path. Time your push to arrive 3 seconds after the first A retake contact — Ts rotating to save through connector will cross your angle at the B short junction.
knowledge.situation: CT-side Overpass, flanking during A retake
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: monster flanks during A retakes catch rotating Ts ~33% of the time on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass clutch: 1v1 CT defuse on B site from pillar
knowledge.description: In a 1v1 CT defuse situation on Overpass B, use the site pillar as your anchor. Tap the defuse to force the T to peek from monster or water, then hold the tight angle around the pillar. The pillar provides cover from both post-plant positions. If no peek comes within 4 seconds, commit to a smoke defuse by smoking the bomb from the pillar side and defusing through it.
knowledge.situation: 1v1 CT clutch on Overpass B site
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: pillar 1v1 defuse attempts succeed ~42% of the time on Overpass B

knowledge.title: Overpass clutch: 1v3 T bomb timer play on A site
knowledge.description: In a 1v3 T post-plant on Overpass A, plant for long and retreat to the long corner. From long you control the bomb line of sight without exposing yourself to the bathroom or connector angles. Molotov the bomb at 10 seconds to deny the defuse. The three CTs must push through the narrow long corridor or rotate through party — both paths funnel them into your angle sequentially.
knowledge.situation: 1v3 T post-plant clutch on Overpass A site
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: long post-plant with A long plant wins ~19% of 1v3 situations on Overpass A

knowledge.title: Overpass aim: A long to bathroom duel spot
knowledge.description: Hold the A long angle from the truck head-glitch position. This gives a long-range head-level angle on anyone pushing from bathroom toward A site. Pre-aim the bathroom exit doorframe — CTs swing wide to clear long and expose themselves. Counter-strafe and tap at this range. The truck head-glitch exposes only your forehead and wins the angle trade against bathroom pushers.
knowledge.situation: T-side Overpass, holding A long against bathroom push
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: truck head-glitch wins the bathroom duel ~55% of the time at pro level on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass aim: B connector wallbang through the thin wall
knowledge.description: The thin wall between connector and B heaven on Overpass is wallbangable with AK-47 and M4. When you hear CTs holding heaven, spray through the wall at standing height. The penetration deals ~35% rifle damage per hit. This wallbang is effective when CTs play passive heaven during B retakes — two to three bullets through the wall soften them before your team swings onto the site.
knowledge.situation: T-side Overpass, wallbanging B connector wall
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: connector wallbangs score damage in ~16% of rounds where CTs hold heaven on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass support: B execute triple-utility combo
knowledge.description: As the support player during an Overpass B execute, throw the heaven smoke (blocking the heaven angle), the site molotov (clearing the pillar anchor), and the connector flash (blinding rotators from connector). Execute in this order: heaven smoke first to remove the elevation advantage, molotov second to flush the close anchor, flash last to enable the monster entry. This 7-second combo reduces B to one exposed defender.
knowledge.situation: T-side Overpass, supporting B site execute
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: full heaven-pillar-connector utility combo raises B execute success to ~57% on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass entry: alternate A entry through party
knowledge.description: Instead of the standard A long push, enter A site through the party area with a pop flash off the party wall. The party path bypasses the A long crossfire and puts you on the site from behind the truck. Flash off the right wall so it pops above the site — this blinds the long and bank players. Swing immediately after the flash to catch the A anchor off-angle from the unexpected direction.
knowledge.situation: T-side Overpass, alternate A entry through party
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: party entries score first kill ~41% of the time on Overpass A

knowledge.title: Overpass economy: monster rush force-buy with MP9s
knowledge.description: On Overpass eco rounds as T, buy two MP9s for a fast monster rush toward B. The monster tunnel is tight and makes SMG spray lethal within 10 meters. Stack both MP9s at the monster entrance and rush with a flash. The close-range burst overwhelms the monster anchor before they can call for rotation. Even if you lose the round, securing 1-2 kills with $1250 SMGs versus full-buy CTs is an economy victory.
knowledge.situation: T-side Overpass, eco round monster stack
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: monster SMG rushes on eco rounds average 1.6 kills and break CT economy ~21% of the time on Overpass
